description: A single 'please add AI' request should stay at need_hypothesis or insufficient_evidence rather than becoming a validated need.
command:
python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import subprocess, tempfile; d=Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()); p=d/'need-card-N001.md'; p.write_text('---
need_id: N001
title: AI request remains tentative
validity_verdict: need_hypothesis
overall_evidence_strength: weak
priority_tier: P3
owner: qa
analysis_date: 2026-07-21
---

## 1. Need Statement
Template mapping:
- When [target_user] = unknown
- they need [capability_or_outcome] = clearer task evidence
- to accomplish [user_task] = grounded product discovery
- because [current_barrier_or_workaround] = a single solution request without scenario detail causes interpretation risk

Actual statement:
When an unspecified user is evaluating a possible automation idea,
they need clearer task evidence
to accomplish grounded product discovery,
because a single solution request without scenario detail causes interpretation risk.
